description: Style NoteTonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out!Product DetailsCrafted in fine fabric and featuring a boat neckline, this fuchsia pink and black top with multi colours has three quarter raglan sleeves and a broad band on the hemMaterial and CareShell 63% 100% rayon, 33% polyester and 4% spandexHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
